majorTuition.zh: 清华大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Tsinghua University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 清华大学是中国最顶尖的理工科大学，工程和计算机科学全球领先。培养了大量国家领导人和科技精英。
desc.en: Tsinghua is China's top science and engineering university with globally leading programs. Has produced numerous national leaders and tech elites.

safetyDetail.zh: 清华大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Tsinghua University has strict campus security and good safety.

visa.zh: 中国学生：无需签证。国际学生：X1签证(长期)或X2签证(短期)。毕业后可通过工作签证留华。
visa.en: Chinese students: no visa needed. International: X1 visa (long-term) or X2 (short-term). Post-graduation work visa available.

employment.zh: 就业前景良好，学校提供就业指导服务。
employment.en: Good employment prospects with career guidance services.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 国际学生需购买综合医疗保险约¥600-800/年。校内设有校医院，提供基本医疗服务。持医保可报销部分费用。
healthcare.en: ✅ International students must purchase insurance ~¥600-800/yr. On-campus hospital provides basic medical services.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：高考统招（内地生）/ 各校国际生申请系统
📅 截止日期：高考后填报志愿 / 国际生1月-5月
💰 申请费：¥0（高考）/ ¥200-800（国际生）
📝 所需材料：高考成绩 / 国际课程成绩、语言成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Gaokao (mainland) / University international portal
📅 Deadline: After Gaokao / International: Jan-May
💰 Fee: ¥0 (Gaokao) / ¥200-800 (international)
📝 Required: Gaokao scores / International curriculum + language scores

majorTuition.zh: 北京大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Peking University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 北京大学是中国最顶尖的综合性大学，人文社科全国第一。创建于1898年，是中国现代高等教育的起源。
desc.en: Peking University is China's top comprehensive university, #1 in humanities and social sciences. Founded in 1898, the origin of modern Chinese higher education.

safetyDetail.zh: 北京大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Peking University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.en: Fudan University tuition ~¥5,500/yr (~$763). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.en: Fudan is Shanghai's top comprehensive university with nationally leading journalism and economics. Highly internationalized.

safetyDetail.zh: 复旦大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Fudan University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 上海交通大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 上海交大是中国顶尖的理工科大学之一，工程学和医学实力雄厚。安泰经管学院亚洲知名。
desc.en: SJTU is one of China's top science universities with strong engineering and medicine. Antai College of Economics & Management is renowned in Asia.

safetyDetail.zh: 上海交通大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 浙江大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Zhejiang University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 浙江大学是中国规模最大的综合性大学之一，学科覆盖面极广。杭州科技创新氛围浓厚（阿里巴巴总部）。
desc.en: ZJU is one of China's largest comprehensive universities with extremely broad discipline coverage. Hangzhou is a tech innovation hub (Alibaba HQ).

safetyDetail.zh: 浙江大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Zhejiang University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 中国科学技术大学本科学费约¥4,800/年（约$666），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: USTC tuition ~¥4,800/yr (~$666). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 中科大以基础科学研究闻名，量子计算和物理学研究全球领先。培养了大量中科院院士。
desc.en: USTC is famous for fundamental science with globally leading quantum computing and physics. Has produced many Chinese Academy of Sciences members.

safetyDetail.zh: 中国科学技术大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: USTC has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 南京大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Nanjing University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.en: NJU is #1 nationally in astronomy and geology with deep fundamental science strengths. A century-old prestigious university.

safetyDetail.zh: 南京大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Nanjing University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 武汉大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Wuhan University tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 武汉大学以樱花和优美校园闻名，测绘科学和遥感全球第一。综合实力强劲的百年名校。
desc.en: WHU is famous for its cherry blossoms and beautiful campus. #1 globally in surveying and remote sensing. A strong century-old university.

safetyDetail.zh: 武汉大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Wuhan University has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 华中科技大学本科学费约¥5,000/年（约$694），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: HUST tuition ~¥5,000/yr (~$694). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 华中科技大学以工科见长，机械工程和光电学科全国顶尖。同济医学院历史悠久。
desc.en: HUST excels in engineering with nationally top mechanical and optoelectronics programs. Tongji Medical College has a long history.

safetyDetail.zh: 华中科技大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: HUST has strict campus security and good safety.

majorTuition.zh: 中山大学本科学费约¥5,500/年（约$763），中国大学学费远低于欧美。
majorTuition.en: Sun Yat-sen University tuition ~¥5,500/yr (~$763). Chinese universities are far more affordable than Western ones.

desc.zh: 中山大学是华南地区最好的综合性大学，医学和商学实力突出。在深圳、珠海设有校区，大湾区就业优势明显。
desc.en: SYSU is South China's top comprehensive university with strong medicine and business. Campuses in Shenzhen and Zhuhai offer GBA employment advantages.

safetyDetail.zh: 中山大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Sun Yat-sen University has strict campus security and good safety.

visa.zh: 中国学生：无需签证。国际学生：X1签证(长期)或X2签证(短期)。毕业后可通过工作签证留华。

majorTuition.zh: 香港大学本科学费约HK$182,000/年（约$23,333），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: University of Hong Kong undergraduate tuition ~HK$182,000/yr (~$23,333). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 香港大学是亚洲最具声望的大学之一，医学和法学全球领先。全英文教学，国际化程度极高。
desc.en: HKU is one of Asia's most prestigious universities with globally leading medicine and law. Fully English-taught, highly internationalized.

safetyDetail.zh: 香港大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: University of Hong Kong has strict campus security and good safety.

visa.zh: 内地学生：凭录取通知书办理逗留签注(D签)。国际学生：需申请学生签证。毕业后可申请IANG签证(1年)，之后可续签。在港居住满7年可申请永久居民。
visa.en: Mainland students: D visa with admission letter. International students: student visa required. After graduation: IANG visa (1 year, renewable). Permanent residency after 7 years in HK.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内宿舍。

employment.zh: 就业前景良好，学校提供就业指导服务。
employment.en: Good employment prospects with career guidance services.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 学校提供医疗保险计划。校内设有University Health Service。香港公立医院急诊费用HK$180。学生可购买额外商业保险约HK$1,500-3,000/年。
healthcare.en: ✅ University health insurance plan available. On-campus University Health Service. HK public hospital ER fee HK$180. Optional commercial insurance ~HK$1,500-3,000/yr.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 截止日期：1月-4月（因校而异）
💰 申请费：HK$300-450
📝 所需材料：高考成绩/SAT/IB/A-Level、英语成绩（雅思6.0+/托福80+）、个人陈述、推荐信
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly to each university
📅 Deadline: Jan-Apr (varies)
💰 Fee: HK$300-450
📝 Required: Gaokao/SAT/IB/A-Level scores, English proficiency (IELTS 6.0+/TOEFL 80+), personal statement, references

majorTuition.zh: 香港中文大学本科学费约HK$145,000/年（约$18,589），各专业学费基本统一。
majorTuition.en: Chinese University of Hong Kong undergraduate tuition ~HK$145,000/yr (~$18,589). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 港中大以双语教育闻名，商学院亚洲顶尖。校园依山傍水，是香港最大最美的大学校园。
desc.en: CUHK is famous for bilingual education with a top Asian business school. Its mountainside campus is Hong Kong's largest and most beautiful.

safetyDetail.zh: 香港中文大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Chinese University of Hong Kong has strict campus security and good safety.

visa.zh: 内地学生：凭录取通知书办理逗留签注(D签)。国际学生：需申请学生签证。毕业后可申请IANG签证(1年)，之后可续签。在港居住满7年可申请永久居民。
visa.en: Mainland students: D visa with admission letter. International students: student visa required. After graduation: IANG visa (1 year, renewable). Permanent residency after 7 years in HK.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内宿舍。

employment.zh: 就业前景良好，学校提供就业指导服务。
employment.en: Good employment prospects with career guidance services.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 学校提供医疗保险计划。校内设有University Health Service。香港公立医院急诊费用HK$180。学生可购买额外商业保险约HK$1,500-3,000/年。
healthcare.en: ✅ University health insurance plan available. On-campus University Health Service. HK public hospital ER fee HK$180. Optional commercial insurance ~HK$1,500-3,000/yr.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 截止日期：1月-4月（因校而异）
💰 申请费：HK$300-450
📝 所需材料：高考成绩/SAT/IB/A-Level、英语成绩（雅思6.0+/托福80+）、个人陈述、推荐信
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly to each university

💰 Fee: HK$300-450
📝 Required: Gaokao/SAT/IB/A-Level scores, English proficiency (IELTS 6.0+/TOEFL 80+), personal statement, references

desc.en: PolyU's hospitality management is ranked #1 globally. Strong design and engineering schools. Focuses on practical application and industry connections.

majorTuition.en: City University of Hong Kong undergraduate tuition ~HK$145,000/yr (~$18,589). Uniform across programs.

desc.en: CityU has risen rapidly in rankings. Business school holds AACSB and EQUIS accreditation. Home to HK's only veterinary school.

majorTuition.en: Hong Kong Baptist University undergraduate tuition ~HK$140,000/yr (~$17,948). Uniform across programs.

desc.zh: 浸大传理学院是亚洲最好的新闻传播学院之一。中医药学院是香港唯一获政府资助的中医学院。
desc.en: HKBU's School of Communication is one of Asia's best for journalism. Its Chinese Medicine school is HK's only government-funded one.

safetyDetail.zh: 香港浸会大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Hong Kong Baptist University has strict campus security and good safety.

desc.zh: 澳门大学是澳门最好的综合性大学，新校区位于横琴。微电子和中葡双语教育为特色。全英/中/葡三语环境。
desc.en: UM is Macau's top university with its new campus on Hengqin. Known for microelectronics and trilingual (English/Chinese/Portuguese) education.

safetyDetail.zh: 澳门大学校园安全管理严格，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: University of Macau has strict campus security and good safety.

visa.zh: 内地学生：凭录取通知书办理逗留签注。国际学生：需申请学生签证。澳门生活成本低于香港。
visa.en: Mainland students: residence permit with admission letter. International: student visa required. Macau living costs lower than HK.

housing.zh: 大一通常保证校内宿舍。

employment.zh: 就业前景良好，学校提供就业指导服务。
employment.en: Good employment prospects with career guidance services.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 学校提供基本医疗保险。校内设有Health Centre。澳门公立医疗费用较低。
healthcare.en: ✅ Basic university health insurance. On-campus Health Centre. Macau public healthcare is affordable.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请
📅 截止日期：1月-6月（因校而异）
💰 申请费：MOP$200-300
📝 所需材料：高考成绩或国际课程成绩、英语成绩
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly
📅 Deadline: Jan-Jun (varies)
💰 Fee: MOP$200-300
📝 Required: Gaokao or international curriculum scores, English proficiency
